commands.review_summary:
The PR sanitizes TTS summary-model output inside `summarizeText` before auto-TTS uses it as spoken text.

PR surface: Source +128, Tests +168. Total +296 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main joins raw summary-model text and the auto-TTS caller sends `summary.summary` to the spoken text candidate. I did not run a live Microsoft/MiniMax TTS repro because this review is read-only.
